column2: A young warrior stands at the gates of Winchester. He is Uhtred of Bebbanburg - Saxon by birth, Dane by upbringing. Beside him stands Brida. Father Beocca vouches for them both. Can a man who worships pagan gods be trusted to fight for Wessex?
